message:
feat: Add heterogeneous speculative decoding with auto Q2 draft

- Draft model runs on GPU for fast token generation
- Target model runs on CPU with mmap (no memory freeze)
- Auto-generate Q2 draft during `zell build` for models 2-50GB
- Support external draft via `--draft` flag for MoE models
- Speculative loop with KV cache rollback on rejection
- Stats tracking for acceptance rate monitoring
